languages.text: {n}Спустя пару мгновений техножрец кивает пустому месту.{/n} "Ты прав, Нунциус, не стоило доверять столь деликатное дело кому попало. Да, мне стоило сразу обратиться к твоей экспертизе — нам стоит прекратить этот балаган и починить тебя самостоятельно".

{n}After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "Quite right, Nuncius, I should not have entrusted just anyone with such a delicate matter. Yes, I should have immediately sought out your expert opinion — we should stop this farce and repair you ourselves."
languages.original_text: {n}Спустя пару мгновений техножрец кивает пустому месту.{/n} "Ты прав, Нунциус, не стоило доверять столь деликатное дело кому попало. Да, мне стоило сразу обратиться к твоей экспертизе — нам стоит прекратить этот балаган и починить тебя самостоятельно".

traits.locale_text: {n}After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "Quite right, Nuncius, I should not have entrusted just anyone with such a delicate matter. Yes, I should have immediately sought out your expert opinion — we should stop this farce and repair you ourselves."

{n}After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "Quite right, Nuncius, I should not have entrusted just anyone with such a delicate matter. Yes, I should have immediately sought out your expert opinion — we should stop this farce and repair you ourselves."

{n}After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "Quite right, Nuncius, I should not have entrusted just anyone with such a delicate matter. Yes, I should have immediately sought out your expert opinion — we should stop this farce and repair you ourselves."

languages.text: {n}Tras unos momentos, el tecnosacerdote asiente en dirección al vacío.{/n} «Efectivamente, Nuncius, no debería haberle confiado un asunto tan delicado a cualquiera. Sí, debería haber recurrido a tu opinión experta. Deberíamos dejar esta farsa y repararle entre nosotros».
languages.original_text: {n}After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "Quite right, Nuncius, I should not have entrusted just anyone with such a delicate matter. Yes, I should have immediately sought out your expert opinion — we should stop this farce and repair you ourselves."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras unos momentos, el tecnosacerdote asiente en dirección al vacío.{/n} «Efectivamente, Nuncius, no debería haberle confiado un asunto tan delicado a cualquiera. Sí, debería haber recurrido a tu opinión experta. Deberíamos dejar esta farsa y repararle entre nosotros».

languages.text: {n}片刻之后，技术神甫对空气点了点头。{/n}“言之有理，努恩修斯。我不应将如此精细的事务随意托付给别人。没错，我应当立即寻求你专业的意见——我们这就结束这场闹剧，一起为你执行修复协议。”
languages.original_text: {n}After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "Quite right, Nuncius, I should not have entrusted just anyone with such a delicate matter. Yes, I should have immediately sought out your expert opinion — we should stop this farce and repair you ourselves."

traits.locale_text: {n}片刻之后，技术神甫对空气点了点头。{/n}“言之有理，努恩修斯。我不应将如此精细的事务随意托付给别人。没错，我应当立即寻求你专业的意见——我们这就结束这场闹剧，一起为你执行修复协议。”

languages.text: {n}Au bout de quelques instants, le technoprêtre hoche la tête.{/n} « Tu as parfaitement raison, Nuncius, je n'aurais pas dû confier une affaire aussi délicate à n'importe qui. Oui, j'aurais mieux fait de te demander immédiatement ton avis d'expert. Nous devrions mettre un terme à cette mascarade et te réparer nous-mêmes. »
languages.original_text: {n}After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "Quite right, Nuncius, I should not have entrusted just anyone with such a delicate matter. Yes, I should have immediately sought out your expert opinion — we should stop this farce and repair you ourselves."

traits.locale_text: {n}Au bout de quelques instants, le technoprêtre hoche la tête.{/n} « Tu as parfaitement raison, Nuncius, je n'aurais pas dû confier une affaire aussi délicate à n'importe qui. Oui, j'aurais mieux fait de te demander immédiatement ton avis d'expert. Nous devrions mettre un terme à cette mascarade et te réparer nous-mêmes. »

languages.text: {n}Birkaç saniye sonra Tekno Rahip, boşluğa başını sallıyor.{/n} "Çok haklısın Nuncius. Böylesine hassas bir konuyu öylece herkese emanet etmemeliydim. Evet, senin uzman görüşüne başvurmalıydım. Bu saçmalığa bir son vermeli ve seni kendimiz onarmalıyız."
languages.original_text: {n}After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "Quite right, Nuncius, I should not have entrusted just anyone with such a delicate matter. Yes, I should have immediately sought out your expert opinion — we should stop this farce and repair you ourselves."

traits.locale_text: {n}Birkaç saniye sonra Tekno Rahip, boşluğa başını sallıyor.{/n} "Çok haklısın Nuncius. Böylesine hassas bir konuyu öylece herkese emanet etmemeliydim. Evet, senin uzman görüşüne başvurmalıydım. Bu saçmalığa bir son vermeli ve seni kendimiz onarmalıyız."

languages.text: {n}Nach einigen Sekunden nickt der Techpriester in besagte Richtung.{/n} "Das stimmt, Nuncius, ich hätte niemanden in eine so delikate Angelegenheit einweihen sollen. Ja, ich hätte sofort Eure Expertenmeinung einholen sollen ... wir sollten diese Farce beenden und Euch selbst reparieren."
languages.original_text: {n}After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "Quite right, Nuncius, I should not have entrusted just anyone with such a delicate matter. Yes, I should have immediately sought out your expert opinion — we should stop this farce and repair you ourselves."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einigen Sekunden nickt der Techpriester in besagte Richtung.{/n} "Das stimmt, Nuncius, ich hätte niemanden in eine so delikate Angelegenheit einweihen sollen. Ja, ich hätte sofort Eure Expertenmeinung einholen sollen ... wir sollten diese Farce beenden und Euch selbst reparieren."

languages.text: {n}しばらくして、技術司祭は誰もいない空気にうなずく。{/n}「その通りです、ヌンシウス。このようなデリケートな問題を誰にも任せるべきではありませんでした。この茶番劇をやめて、自分たちで修理すべきだったのです」。
languages.original_text: {n}After a few moments, the Tech-Priest nods at the empty air.{/n} "Quite right, Nuncius, I should not have entrusted just anyone with such a delicate matter. Yes, I should have immediately sought out your expert opinion — we should stop this farce and repair you ourselves."
